Campaign_Name: The name of the PR campaign or initiative
Partner_Organization: The name of the organization that Lee's Market partnered with for the campaign
Year: The year the campaign took place
Media_Coverage_Value: The estimated dollar value of the positive media coverage generated by the campaign
Customer_Acquisition_Cost_Change: The percentage change in customer acquisition cost as a result of the campaign
Brand_Sentiment_Score_Change: The change in brand sentiment scores in participating cities as a result of the campaign
